hypothesis: If a single-agent pipeline combining structured PDF parsing with vision-language model image processing and a large language model for schema-guided extraction is applied to scientific chemical information extraction, then it will achieve competitive or superior precision, recall, and F1 scores compared to both baseline LLMs and specialized multi-agent systems, because consolidating document structure preservation, multimodal understanding, and domain-specific prompting within a streamlined single-agent architecture reduces error propagation and coordination overhead inherent in multi-agent pipelines.
